## Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Expected Behavior
What should happen?

## Actual Behavior
What actually happens?

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Environment
- Team: [DS Team 1 / DS Team 2 / DS Team 3]
- Component: [API / Dashboard / Model / Other]
- Browser/Device (if applicable): 

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Priority
- [ ] Blocker (stops other work)
- [ ] High (affects demo)
- [ ] Medium (affects quality)
- [ ] Low (nice to have)
